root.rep_text: รายงาน Statement บัญชีเงินฝาก

deposit_type_code.text: ประเภทเงินฝาก

operate_date.text: ตั้งแต่วันที่

deposit_account_no.text: ตั้งแต่เลขที่บัญชี

root.sql:
SELECT pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_opened_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY') as deposit_opened_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no) as group_name, pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no , 'XX-XXXXXXXXXXXX' ) as from_deposit_account_no, decode( sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.sign_flag , 1 , sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_balance , null ) as decode_dep , decode( sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.sign_flag , -1 , sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_balance , null ) as decode_withdraw, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_name, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance, sc_dep_m_creditor.withdrawable_amount, sc_dep_m_creditor_item.seq_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_dep_m_creditor_item.operate_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY') as operate_date, sc_dep_m_creditor_item.item_type, sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_balance, sc_dep_m_creditor_item.total_balance, sc_dep_m_creditor_item.officer_id, sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no, sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.deposit_item_type, sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.sign_flag, sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.print_code, sc_dep_m_creditor_item.book_status, sc_dep_m_creditor_item.tax_amount, sc_dep_m_creditor_item.int_amount, sc_com_m_branch.branch_name, sc_dep_m_creditor.member_status, sc_dep_m_creditor_item.old_acc_int, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!operate_date_1!' , 'DD/MM/YYYY') as adtm_bdate, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!operate_date_2!' , 'DD/MM/YYYY') as adtm_edate,
( select max(pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_dep_m_creditor_item.operate_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY')) from sc_dep_m_creditor_item where sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no = sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_account_no and sc_dep_m_creditor_item.item_type = 'INT' /*WHERE*/ ) as start_calcint_tdate,
pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_dep_m_creditor.last_calcint_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY') as last_calcint_tdate, sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code, sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name, sc_dep_m_creditor_item.refer_seq_no, sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_group_code FROM sc_dep_m_creditor, sc_dep_m_creditor_item, sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type, sc_com_m_branch, sc_dep_m_rule WHERE ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no = sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_account_no ) and ( sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.deposit_item_type = sc_dep_m_creditor_item.item_type ) and ( sc_dep_m_creditor.branch_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ) and ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) /*WHERE*/ -- and (sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = '10') -- and ( sc_dep_m_creditor_item.operate_date between '01/01/2019' and '22/10/2019') -- and ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no between '100017684' and '100017684' )
